title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because even though arrangement Haki is supposed to make people take form,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and even against your super-hard "armored defense**

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The crazy thing about you isn't your Mochi powers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's your observation Haki, isn't it?!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 17 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
